headline: A $24,950 Electric Pickup Truck? Bezos-Backed Company Ready To Take On Tesla
summary: Slate Auto is bringing its basic electric pickup truck to market with a starting price point of $24,950. Is this the key to market share gains for EVs?

raw.headline: A $24,950 Electric Pickup Truck? Bezos-Backed Company Ready To Take On Tesla
raw.summary: Slate Auto is bringing its basic electric pickup truck to market with a starting price point of $24,950. Is this the key to market share gains for EVs?

headline: General Motors (GM) Stock Sees Split Analyst Revisions As Battery And Software Bets Draw Debate
summary: General Motors is back in focus as analysts update price targets around new expectations for what the stock could be worth, with some recent revisions reaching as high as US$131. Those changes largely track how different firms view the potential of General Motors energy storage, autonomous technologies, robotics, and digital services efforts to add value on top of the core auto business, while weighing the execution risks that still sit in the way. As you read on, you will see how these...

headline: Toyota gains on General Motors in new U.S. sales forecast: 'GM may be looking over their shoulder'
summary: Toyota has notably leaned into hybrid vehicles while GM and others bet on all-electric vehicles, which saw lower-than-expected adoption from consumers.

raw.headline: Toyota gains on General Motors in new U.S. sales forecast: 'GM may be looking over their shoulder'
raw.summary: Toyota has notably leaned into hybrid vehicles while GM and others bet on all-electric vehicles, which saw lower-than-expected adoption from consumers.

headline: Why Detroit Autos Could Be in Trouble Soon. Hint: Saying Goodbye to Big Profits?
summary: One aspect of the automotive industry that has held true for decades is that Americans love their trucks and SUVs – but there is an early alarm bell ringing with recent demand shifts.

raw.headline: Why Detroit Autos Could Be in Trouble Soon. Hint: Saying Goodbye to Big Profits?
raw.summary: One aspect of the automotive industry that has held true for decades is that Americans love their trucks and SUVs – but there is an early alarm bell ringing with recent demand shifts.

headline: GM, Toyota And Other Automakers Warn California Car Sales Could Halt In July If This Legislation Is Not Delayed
summary: California car sales may stop if state doesn't postpone parts of law protecting domestic violence survivors, automakers say.

headline: Samantha Wildow: Shearer’s potato chip production factory opens in Moraine following $110M investment
summary: * Save Ribbon cutting for Shearer’s Foods in Moraine About 60 million pounds of chips, treats, and other snacks will be coming out of the new Shearer’s Foods production facility filling the former General Motors vehicle painting facility off Stroop Road in Moraine, according to the company. Shearer’s leaders, the Dayton business community, the city of Moraine, and lawmakers celebrated the ...
